title: lolium multiflorum var. compositum
intro: Lolium multiflorum var. compositum, also known as Italian ryegrass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family (Poaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are believed to contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion. Lolium multiflorum var. compositum is also used to treat various health issues, including gastritis, diarrhea, and fever, and is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and capsules. Additionally, it is sometimes used as a food supplement due to its potential to support gut health and immune function.
